venture.mission: Deliver open-source construction intelligence that eliminates project delays and rework through proactive, spatially-aware decision navigation.
venture.vision: A world where every construction project completes on time and on budget through AI-powered federated data intelligence across the full project lifecycle.

pitch.oneLiner: Open-source construction intelligence delivering proactive decision navigation with spatial awareness
pitch.problem: Construction loses 30%+ to delays and rework from siloed BIM, schedules, and field data. Decision escalations take 28+ hours at $13,210 per incident. 67% of projects exceed budgets, $1.6T annual waste.
pitch.solution: Federated data platform with AI-powered decision lifecycle, voxel decision surfaces for proactive field navigation, and zero-friction capture via phone agents
pitch.market: Construction Tech - $22 trillion industry, $15B software market, 12% CAGR
pitch.differentiator: Proactive decision attachment to physical space (voxels), 7-tier authority cascade, AI graph traversal, offline-first edge architecture
pitch.businessModel: Open-core: Apache 2.0 platform + commercial extensions + professional services
pitch.traction: 92/100 production readiness score, 35/62 E2E tests passing in staging CI (fixture improvements in progress), 11 services operational on staging, decision lifecycle schemas validated (4 new schemas), Canadian pilot March 2026 ($50K verbal commitment), partner demo completed Dec 2025
pitch.ask: Pre-seed $500K-$1M targeting Q2 2026. Pilot validation → 15-20 investor meetings → close. Use: 60% team, 15% infrastructure, 15% operations, 10% buffer.
pitch.technology: Cloud-native platform: Next.js + TypeScript, PostgreSQL + PostGIS, Redis, Speckle Server (BIM federation), Docker Compose orchestration, 5-layer immutable architecture, 11 operational services, 24/39 MCP decision tools operational, Qdrant vector DB for RAG

resolved.title: Module Initialization Timing Bug (P0)
resolved.resolution: getCorsOrigins() called at module load time with spread operator before function availability in webpack bundle. Moved function call to separate line before spread operator.

resolved.title: GitHub Projects Sync Test Fix (P2)
resolved.resolution: Implemented graceful degradation for GitHub authentication and MCP GraphQL endpoint with informational logging - CI/CD compatible

resolved.title: Infrastructure Validation Test Fix (P2)
resolved.resolution: Implemented retry logic (3 attempts), critical vs optional service distinction, resilient assertions for protected endpoints - Fortune 500 enterprise patterns

resolved.title: BIM Viewer E2E Tests Completion (6 specs)
resolved.resolution: Implemented 140 comprehensive BIM viewer tests across 5 test suites (auth, functional, upload, render, investigation) with enterprise rigor - zero shortcuts, performance budgets, security-first

keyMilestones.note: LEAD milestone - changes cascade to 2 downstream ventures (JobsiteControl, Qullqa). Requires L4 (Architect) authority to modify. Viiva removed: launches standalone Phase 1, Ectropy integration is Phase 6.
EXTERNAL milestone - date set by pilot partner. Requires L5 (Owner) authority to modify. Adjusted to mid-March to accommodate Feb 28 repo split.
Funding milestone - requires L5 (Owner) authority. 30-day buffer for investor timing.
